title: REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH AND EDUCATION SERVICES - 211info
text: WEST EUGENE HEALTH CENTER REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH AND EDUCATION SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a wide range of sexual and reproductive health care services, including birth control, emergency contraception (morning after pill), annual gynecological exams, PAP tests, colposcopy and LEEP procedures, breast exams, LGBTQ2+ services, Gender Affirming Hormone Therapy (GAHT), sexually transmitted disease (STD) testing and treatment, HIV testing, blood herpes testing, pregnancy testing and options information. Provides a medication based abortion (up to 10 weeks) and surgical abortion (up to 13 weeks and 6 days). 793 N Danebo Street Eugene, OR 97402 Eligibility: Varies by service. HPV immunizations available for age 18 and younger. Hours: Monday/Tuesday/Wednesday 9:30am-6pm, Thursday/Friday 10:30am-6pm (541) 344-9411 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 344-9411 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information and to schedule an appointment. Limited walk-ins accepted. FEES: OHP and most private insurance accepted. Sliding scale fees available. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable. Income information for those applying for sliding scale fees. LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Benton, Coos, Deschutes, Douglas, Lane, Lincoln, and Linn Counties SITE HOURS: Monday/Tuesday/Wednesday/Friday 9:30-6pm, Thursday 10:30am-6pm Services: Colposcopy HIV Testing HPV Immunizations Pre-Abortion Counseling Pro-Choice Pregnancy Counseling Sexually Transmitted Infection Treatment Women's Health Centers Other Services Offered At This Location: HUMAN REPRODUCTION - OREGON REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH PROGRAM CLINIC If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. WEST EUGENE HEALTH CENTER
